content.query:
SELECT TOP (100) 
arr.*
,arp.*
FROM 
[ODS].[ERP_AR_REGISTER] arr
left join [ODS].[ERP_AR_PAYMENT] arp on
arr.ReferenceNbr = arp.ReferenceNbr
AND arr.Type = arp.Type
where 
arr.ReferenceNbr = '020182' and arr.Type = 'Credit Memo'

 select [Type], count(1), sum(ARRegister_docBal), sum(ARRegister_origDocAmt)
 FROM [ODS].[ERP_AR_REGISTER]
 group BY
 [Type] 
 order by 2 desc

 select top 100 * from [ODS].[ERP_AR_REGISTER] arr
